title: HorkiamProject
description: A carefully curated private collection of mods for a small group of friends, focusing on Magic & Exploration & Tech & Citybuilding with Minecolonys in Minecraft 1.20.1
body:
# Overview
This project is a comprehensive 1.20.1 modpack designed for a private group of players, focusing on a deep integration between technology, magic, and world exploration. With over 300 carefully selected mods, it offers a rich sandbox experience where automation meets adventure.

# Key Features

### Advanced Automation: 
Built around the Create ecosystem with numerous addons like Create: New Age , Diesel Generators , and Big Cannons.

### Technical Depth: 
Includes industry-standard tech mods like Applied Energistics 2 , Mekanism , and Ender IO  for high-end resource management.

### Magical Arts: 
Master the arcane with Ars Nouveau , Blood Magic , and Draconic Evolution.

### Enhanced Exploration: 
Discover new structures and challenges with Dungeons and Taverns , Alex's Mobs , and the Deeper and Darker dimension.

### Colony Building: 
Lead your own civilization using MineColonies.

### Performance Optimized: 
Integrated with modern performance boosters like FerriteCore , Entity Culling , and Dynamic FPS  to ensure stability despite the high mod count.

# Environment & Usage

### RAM Usage
It is recommended to allocate at least **12 GB of RAM** for singleplayer.
If you are playing on a server, **8 GB is usually sufficient for the client**.
For a server with **2–4 players**, it is recommended to allocate around **10 GB of RAM**.

Performance may vary depending on render distance, shaders, and additional mods.

### Multiplayer: 
Optimized for private server play with Open Parties and Claims for land protection.

### Private Project: 
This pack is a non-commercial project intended for private use. 
**All rights to the included mods belong to their respective developers.**
